title: coleus graveolens
intro: Coleus graveolens, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a perennial plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is known for its essential oil, which contains compounds with medicinal properties, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coleus graveolens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage stress and anxiety. The herbal preparation of Coleus graveolens can be found in various forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and infused teas, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
